spec.name: A Dusty Trail In The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are on a dusty trail leading through the deep, dark forest. Ancient grey trees loom all around you. The trail continues north and east.

north.description: The dusty trail leads north through the trees.

east.description: The dusty trail leads east through the trees.

extra_descs.description: The ancient grey giants seem to observe you silently.
